p.strong: Batch Size Tradeoffs in Dynamic Request Batching

ul.li: Every gain in throughput costs some latency
Choose operating point based on SLA requirements

g.text: Low Batch (1-4) | 1-4 | Low latency, poor GPU utilization
High Batch (64+) | 64+ | Max throughput, latency explodes
Diminishing Returns | 128+ | Throughput gains minimal, latency 2x
3. Optimal batch = max throughput before latency cliff
